AuditLog.title: Audit Log
AuditLog.description: Immutable record of security events and system actions for OSFI E-21 compliance.

user.description: The user or system agent that performed the action.

details.description: Additional context or metadata about the event.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

ThreatEvent.title: Threat Event
ThreatEvent.description: Real-time security threats intercepted by Lakera Guard.

source.description: The origin of the threat (e.g., 'Chat Widget').

description.description: Detailed description of the intercepted payload.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who triggered the event.

/audit_logs/{logId}.description: Collection of all system audit logs.

/threat_feed/{threatId}.description: Real-time feed of intercepted security threats.
